description: Official FLAC Python API snapshot for flac3d 7.0.

attach.description: Functions and classes for working with FLAC3D gridpoint attaches.

gridpoint.description: Functions and classes for working with FLAC3D gridpoints.

interface.description: Functions and classes for working with FLAC3D interfaces.

interfaceelementarray.description: Array interface for FLAC3D interface elements.

interfacenodearray.description: Array interface for FLAC3D interface node.

vertexarray.description: Array interface for Itasca wall vertices.

zone.description: Functions and classes for working with FLAC3D zones.

Attach.note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.attach module functions.

Gridpoint.note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.gridpoint module functions.

method_groups.disp: disp, disp_small, disp_small_x, disp_small_y, disp_small_z, disp_x, disp_y, disp_z, set_disp, set_disp_small, set_disp_small_x, set_disp_small_y, set_disp_small_z, set_disp_x, set_disp_y, set_disp_z
method_groups.fluid: fluid_load, fluid_modulus, fluid_modulus_confined, fluid_tension, fluid_unbal, fluid_vol_inv, set_fluid_load, set_fluid_modulus, set_fluid_tension, set_fluid_unbal
method_groups.force: force_app, force_app_x, force_app_y, force_app_z, force_load, force_load_x, force_load_y, force_load_z, force_unbal, force_unbal_x, force_unbal_y, force_unbal_z, set_force_load, set_force_load_x, set_force_load_y, set_force_load_z
method_groups.mass: mass_add, mass_add_x, mass_add_y, mass_add_z, mass_gravity, mass_inertial, set_mass_add, set_mass_add_x, set_mass_add_y, set_mass_add_z
method_groups.pos: pos, pos_x, pos_y, pos_z, set_pos, set_pos_x, set_pos_y, set_pos_z
method_groups.temp: set_temp, set_temp_change, set_temp_source, temp, temp_change, temp_source
method_groups.vel: set_vel, set_vel_x, set_vel_y, set_vel_z, vel, vel_x, vel_y, vel_z

Interface.note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.interface module functions.

Zone.note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.zone module functions.

method_groups.face: face_areas, face_extra, face_find, face_find_normal, face_group, face_group_remove, face_in_group, face_normals, set_face_extra, set_face_group
method_groups.strain: strain, strain_rate, strain_shear_inc, strain_shear_rate, strain_vol_inc, strain_vol_rate
method_groups.stress: set_stress, stress, stress_effective, stress_int, stress_max, stress_min, stress_prin, stress_prin_dir, stress_prin_x, stress_prin_y, stress_prin_z
method_groups.work: set_work_elastic_shear, set_work_elastic_vol, set_work_plastic_shear, set_work_plastic_vol, work_elastic_shear, work_elastic_total, work_elastic_vol, work_plastic_shear, work_plastic_total, work_plastic_vol

Element.note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.interface.element module functions.

Node.note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.interface.node module functions.

method_groups.disp: disp, disp_shear, disp_shear_set, disp_shear_x, disp_shear_x_set, disp_shear_y, disp_shear_y_set, disp_shear_z, disp_shear_z_set
method_groups.pos: pos, pos_set, pos_x, pos_x_set, pos_y, pos_y_set, pos_z, pos_z_set
method_groups.stress: stress_normal, stress_shear, stress_shear_set, stress_shear_x, stress_shear_x_set, stress_shear_y, stress_shear_y_set, stress_shear_z, stress_shear_z_set
method_groups.vel: vel, vel_set, vel_x, vel_x_set, vel_y, vel_y_set, vel_z, vel_z_set
